name: chagee-federated-clone
description: A CHAGEE Malaysia-inspired React/Vite micro-frontend clone using Zephyr Cloud and Module Federation.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n brand,menu,growth,shell -c '#8a1f2d,#2f6b4f,#b5833b,#111111' "npm run dev -w @chagee/brand-remote" "npm run dev -w @chagee/menu-remote" "npm run dev -w @chagee/growth-remote" "npm run dev -w @chagee/shell"
scripts.preview: concurrently -k -n brand,menu,growth,shell -c '#8a1f2d,#2f6b4f,#b5833b,#111111' "npm run preview -w @chagee/brand-remote" "npm run preview -w @chagee/menu-remote" "npm run preview -w @chagee/growth-remote" "npm run preview -w @chagee/shell"
